sourcesContent:
import React from "react";

const MapDefsMarkers = () => (
  <svg>
    <defs>
      <marker
        id="arrow"
        viewBox="0 0 6 6"
        refX="3"
        refY="3"
        markerWidth="6"
        markerHeight="6"
        orient="auto"
      >
        <path d="M0,3v-3l6,3l-6,3z" style={{ fill: "red" }} />
      </marker>
      <marker
        id="arrow-off"
        viewBox="0 0 6 6"
        refX="3"
        refY="3"
        markerWidth="6"
        markerHeight="6"
        orient="auto"
      >
        <path
          d="M0,3v-3l6,3l-6,3z"
          style={{ fill: "black", fillOpacity: 0.2 }}
        />
      </marker>
    </defs>
  </svg>
);

export default MapDefsMarkers;
